rationale: No headlines this cycle directly affect Portugal; Beirut strikes and Iran deal remain distant background noise with no confirmed energy price impact.

top_events.title: Israeli strikes on Beirut continue; Trump says Iran deal still close
top_events.summary: Continued Beirut strikes and unconfirmed Iran deal rhetoric pose minor indirect risk to EU energy prices, but no confirmed market move affecting Portugal.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: Large UK-Japan trade deal has negligible direct impact on Portugal's economy or daily life.
